name: XM1014 | 太古传说
descriptionEn: The XM1014 is a powerful fully automatic shotgun that justifies its heftier price tag with the ability to paint a room with lead fast. A pale green, beige, and red pattern of ancient tiles has been applied. \"Hope remains, even for those who began their journey down the wrong path\"
descriptionZh: XM1014 是一把强大的全自动霰弹枪，其高昂的价格赋予了它高射速和室内清剿的能力。 这把武器使用了浅绿、米色与红色相搭配的花纹。 \"我们必须对生活先有信心，然后才能使生活永远延续下去，而所谓信心，就是希望。\"
